title: Build out market hypothesis builder with stakeholder clustering
body: Create a system that clusters stakeholder POVs together to generate categories like 'what hiring thinks', 'what talent thinks', 'what community owners think', etc. This would be a stakeholder-by-stakeholder analysis that aggregates perspectives into meaningful segments.

title: Learning Depth Matrix - Understanding Level Classification
body: Design and implement a matrix/taxonomy for classifying the degree or level of learning/understanding achieved in conversations. Create a framework that can categorize learning moments by depth (surface/intermediate/deep), domain (technical/business/strategic), and retention value. This would complement the learning capture system by providing qualitative assessment of knowledge transfer and help prioritize which learnings warrant deeper documentation or knowledge base integration.

title: Learning Capture System - Conversation Knowledge Extraction
body: Create an equivalent system to lessons/commands that captures and processes discussions where learning occurred. Build infrastructure to identify, extract, and store learnings from conversations similar to how the lessons system tracks architectural learnings and the commands system tracks executable workflows. This would enable systematic capture of knowledge gained through discussions, technical explanations, and learning moments.
